storage.description: Exactly the four CoreResources; the generated schema rejects any other key (DC6).

ResourceStorageSeed.description: A /data/economy resource-storage seed file: versioned envelope (DC5) keyed by CoreResource ONLY (DC6) plus DC4 value metadata for every numeric leaf under `storage`.

start_stock.description: Owner-approved starting stock (Economy §3); placed in Safe storage at world creation.

safe_capacity_st1.description: Safe storage capacity S at ST1 (Economy §7).

ResourceStorageDefinition.description: One CoreResource's storage definition at ST1 (Economy §7 row + §3 start stock). All three capacities are seeded explicitly — the D1 relationship (exposed = 2×S, total = 3×S) is cross-checked by the seed validator, never derived in sim code (No Magic Numbers: the multipliers are doctrine values, not code constants).

SeedValueMetadata.description: DC4 unit-requirement metadata for one numeric seed value. `path` is the dot-path of the numeric field under the seed's payload root (`kit` for guardian seeds, `storage` for resource-storage seeds); the validator enforces that every numeric leaf has exactly one entry and every entry resolves to a numeric leaf.

Unit.description: Value-cadence vocabulary for seed metadata (Doc 07 §2 / §1.2, DC4).

$comment: GENERATED from src/contracts/resource-storage.ts (D39) — do not edit by hand; run `pnpm run schema:generate`.
